|---|---|

**Total count:** 6 PRs across 3 repositories.

**PR with the most additions:** **#1044** (on `acme/infra`) with **653 additions**.

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def all-prs (github_pull_requests))
(def filtered (filter #(and (= (:state %) "open") (> (:additions %) 400) (nil? (:closes_linear %))) all-prs))
(def total (count filtered))
(def per-repo (frequencies (map :repo filtered)))
(def max-pr (apply max-key :additions filtered))
(def max-number (:number max-pr))
(def max-additions (:additions max-pr))
(def result {:total total
      …(+121)
